caption: A person's hands are shown opening a sports card package on a desk. In the top left frame, the person pulls a clear plastic sleeve from a box. Moving to the top right, the person continues to slide a card out of a box featuring a baseball player and the text "EARLY" and "UTHENTIC" with "2020" printed below. In the bottom left frame, the person holds a card encased in a plastic protector, tilting it toward the camera. Finally, in the bottom right frame, the person manipulates the clear plastic packaging. A black mat with a red and orange logo reading "JASPY'S CASEBREAKS" is visible on the table. A small inset window shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap. Other on-screen graphics include the "JASPY'S CASEBREAKS.COM" logo and "CASEBREAKS" text across the bottom.
